Never create .md files that contain information about the changes made by Copilot.
The UI is a Blazor that uses the rendermode InteractiveServer.
When writing C# code, always ensure that it builds successfully and that when it is built there are no warnings in the build logs.
When writing C# code for Blazor components, always ensure that the components follow best practices for performance and usability.
When writing C# code, always ensure proper exception handling is in place to maintain application stability.
When writing C# code, always use dependency injection to manage service lifetimes and dependencies effectively.
When writing C# code, ensure tests are written in the same format as existing tests in the project.
When writing C# code, ensure that test coverage is at least 80% for the new code being added.
